meta.title: Flink E2E Raw Kafka Output — Module 7 + Module 8
meta.note: All messages below are raw JSON consumed directly from Kafka output topics

messages.triggerSummary: HALT: Triple whammy AKI risk. Patient on RASi + SGLT2i + diuretic with weight drop.
messages.recommendedAction: Pause SGLT2i and diuretic. Urgent eGFR + creatinine within 48 hours. If confirmed AKI: hold all three agents until renal function recovers.

messages.triggerSummary: PAUSE: Thiazide-associated glucose rise. FBG increased 20 mg/dL in 14 days.
messages.recommendedAction: Consider: CCB substitution, dose reduction, or SGLT2i addition.

messages.triggerSummary: HALT: Euglycemic DKA risk. Patient on SGLT2i with nausea/vomiting. Glucose may be NORMAL despite ketoacidosis.
messages.recommendedAction: Hold SGLT2i immediately. Check blood ketones urgently. If ketones elevated: emergency department. If no symptoms: hold 48h, resume after trigger resolves.

messages.triggerSummary: HALT: Euglycemic DKA risk. Patient on SGLT2i with nausea/vomiting. Glucose may be NORMAL despite ketoacidosis.

messages.triggerSummary: WARNING: NSAIDs + SGLT2i increase AKI risk and reduce SGLT2i renal benefit.
messages.recommendedAction: Advise NSAID avoidance. If analgesia needed: paracetamol preferred.
